query:
SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.is_automatic,
  w.manual_code as worker_code,
  w.full_name as worker_name
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.manual_code = 'R04'
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY ae.event_time;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.is_automatic,
  w.manual_code as worker_code,
  w.full_name as worker_name
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.manual_code = 'R04'
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY ae.event_time;
